narrative.summary:
𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟

Squamish Valley — where the Cheakamus River bends

You're sitting on a weathered deck, glacial-green water flowing past, snowcapped peaks rising into clouds. This isn't a restaurant view — it's why the restaurant exists.

blocks.title: Arrival
blocks.body:
𝗔𝗥𝗥𝗜𝗩𝗔𝗟

Squamish Valley — where the Cheakamus River bends

You're sitting on a weathered deck, glacial-green water flowing past, snowcapped peaks rising into clouds. This isn't a restaurant view — it's why the restaurant exists.

blocks.title: Pull Into The Gravel Lot. Red Adirondack Chairs Scattered By The Water. The Wooden Building Looks Like Someone's Uncle Built It In The '70s And They Just Kept Adding Decks
blocks.body: Pull into the gravel lot. Red Adirondack chairs scattered by the water. The wooden building looks like someone's uncle built it in the '70s and they just kept adding decks.

blocks.title: Space
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗦𝗣𝗔𝗖𝗘

Floor-to-ceiling windows. Every table has the view. Friends crowd around platters of everything — burgers, wings, eggs benny, Caesars. This is what a road trip lunch looks like when you find the right place.

blocks.title: Drinks
blocks.body:
𝗗𝗥𝗜𝗡𝗞𝗦

🍹 The classics:
• Caesar — $9 (spiced rim, pickled bean) ⭐
• Coronarita — $14 (Corona inverted in margarita)
• OK Springs 1516 Lager — $6.25/16oz

This is a "beer with a view" kind of place. Order your drink, take it out to the deck, watch eagles circle over the river.

blocks.title: Food
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗠𝗘𝗡𝗨

𝗕𝗥𝗘𝗔𝗞𝗙𝗔𝗦𝗧 $14-22
• Classic Benny — $18
• Watershed Benny (smoked salmon) — $22 ⭐
• Breakfast Skillet — $18
• Chorizo Scramble — $19

𝗕𝗨𝗥𝗚𝗘𝗥𝗦 $19-24
• Watershed Burger — $21 (bacon, cheese, onion ring tower) ⭐
• Bison Burger — $24
• Mushroom Swiss — $21
• Pulled Pork Burger — $19

𝗣𝗨𝗕 𝗙𝗔𝗥𝗘 $10-26
• Fish & Chips — $21 (local catch, beer batter) ⭐
• Wings (1lb) — $17
• Nashville Hot Chicken Sando — $23
• Poutine — $14

𝗗𝗜𝗡𝗡𝗘𝗥 $22-32
• Roast Beef Dinner — $25 (Yorkshire pud, gravy)
• Salmon — $28
• Steak Sandwich — $26
• Ribs (full rack) — $32 ⭐

Note: Menu rotates seasonally. Brunch served daily until 3pm.

blocks.title: Check
blocks.body:
𝗧𝗛𝗘 𝗖𝗛𝗘𝗖𝗞

💰 $$

Lunch for 2: $50-70 (with drinks)
Dinner for 2: $80-110 (with drinks)

Reservations: Walk-in only — no reservations
Note: Cash only (ATM on site)

📞 604-898-2002
🌐 watershedgrill.com
📸 @watershedgrill

𝗛𝗢𝗨𝗥𝗦
Daily: 9am – 9pm (kitchen closes 8:30pm)
Closed Tuesdays (winter)

𝗕𝗘𝗦𝗧 𝗧𝗜𝗠𝗘𝗦
• Weekday lunch (11am-2pm) — quietest, best deck seats
• Late afternoon (3-5pm) — golden light on mountains
• Summer weekends — arrive before 11am or expect a wait
• Eagle watching season (Nov-Feb) — hundreds gather on the river
